item.author: tomerg

item.title: 百万美元项目 | One Million Dollar Project
item.description:
克里斯-安德森1

发表于 6 月 25 日

你好世界，这个项目是我开始学习以来完成的第一个编码项目。 我通过 Codecademy 开始了我的教育，这是第一个单元项目，我被要求构建某种我选择的终端游戏。 我选择重新创建《谁想成为百万富翁》这款精彩的游戏。

我的代码允许您向节目介绍自己，解释游戏的运作方式，允许您选择回答练习问题（如果您愿意），然后玩游戏。

尽管我知道这个概念很基本并且代码很混乱，但我很高兴能够做出或多或少有用的东西哈！ 并与人分享来玩。 我很高兴能够在未来了解更多并制作更好的程序，也许有一天我可以回顾这一点并记住我的第一个项目，看看我已经走了多远。 感谢您的阅读和愉快的编程:)

一旦被暂停，chrisanderson1 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，chrisanderson1 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，chrisanderson1 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 chrisanderson1 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 chrisanderson1：

使 chrisanderson1 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 chrisanderson1 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

chris-anderson1

Posted on Jun 25

Hello World, this project is my very first ever coding project I've completed since I started learning. I've begun my education through Codecademy and this is the first unit project where I was asked to build some kind of terminal game of my choosing. I chose to recreate the fantastic game that is Who wants to be a Millionaire.

My code allows you to introduce yourself to the show, explains how the game works, allows you the option of answering a practice question if you so choose, and then playing the game.

Although I know the concept is basic and the code is messy, I'm very excited to be able to make something that more or less works ha! And share it with people to play. I'm excited to learn more and to make better programs in the future and maybe one day I can look back at this and remember my very first project and see how far I've come. Thanks for reading and happy programming :)

Adetutu Oluwasanmi - Jun 24

Once suspended, chrisanderson1 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, chrisanderson1 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by chrisanderson1 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If chrisanderson1 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag chrisanderson1:

Make all posts by chrisanderson1 less visible

chrisanderson1 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging chrisanderson1 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: chrisanderson1
